dashboard.title: Operations home
dashboard.description: Start here: utilities status, water reporting, and links to docs. Add runbooks and task lists when ready.

options.content:
Deep Springs — Operations
Utilities · Water · Documentation · (runbooks & tasks — coming soon)

### At-a-glance status

**[Utilities — Live HUD](/d/utilities-ops-overview)**  
Solar, grid, hydro output, and hydro inflow — color-coded for quick reads.

**[Hydro power (detailed)](/d/hydro-power-output)**  
Longer-range hydro power series (single-focus chart).

---
*Tip: bookmark this home dashboard, then open the HUD for daily rounds.*

### Compliance & schedules

**[Water sampling — ops view](/d/water-compliance-schedule)**  
Lead/copper schedule, due dates, and import status — written for field and ops staff.

---
*After each CSV import, refresh that dashboard (or wait for its auto-refresh).*  
Import scripts live in the repo under `water-compliance/scripts/`.

### Repo docs (replace with your wiki links when ready)

| Topic | Where |
|-------|--------|
| R2 → Neon ingest | `neon-loader/README.md` |
| Worker uploads | `worker/README.md` |
| Water CSV imports | `water-compliance/README.md` |

**Stack / meta-instruction** — *Add a link here later* (runbooks, credentials rotation, who to call).

### Miscellaneous (placeholder)

Use this section later for:

- **Maintenance checklist** — backups, token renewal, ingest health
- **One-off tasks** — link to Linear/Jira/Notion or paste bullets
- **On-call / escalation** — phone tree, after-hours

---
*Edit this dashboard in Grafana or update `neon-loader/grafana/dashboard.ops-home.json` in git.*

message: Add operations home: utilities + water + doc placeholders
